children.title: Chapter 1: Introduction and System Overview
children.summary: This guide provides complete specifications for integrating the IntelliRoute Adaptive Knowledge Engine. IntelliRoute is designed for enterprise grade assistants that require high speed, low cost, and adaptive accuracy.
children.content:
This guide provides complete specifications for integrating the IntelliRoute Adaptive Knowledge Engine.
IntelliRoute is designed for enterprise grade assistants that require high speed, low cost, and adaptive accuracy.

children.title: 1.1 Architecture Highlights
children.summary: - Multi-model routing: dynamically chooses model based on query difficulty. - Dual retrieval routing: switches between Vector DB search and PageIndex structural tree navigation. - Semantic cache: skips duplicate LLM calls to minimize latency and toke...
children.content:
- Multi-model routing: dynamically chooses model based on query difficulty.
- Dual retrieval routing: switches between Vector DB search and PageIndex structural tree navigation.
- Semantic cache: skips duplicate LLM calls to minimize latency and token billing.

children.title: Chapter 2: Security & Authentication Specification
children.summary: All connections to IntelliRoute APIs must be signed and authorized.
children.content: All connections to IntelliRoute APIs must be signed and authorized.

children.title: 2.1 API Key Management
children.summary: Enterprise administrators can generate API keys from the admin dashboard. Keys must be passed in the `X-API-Key` HTTP request header. To revoke a key, update the key status to `revoked` in the DB or click the revoke button.
children.content:
Enterprise administrators can generate API keys from the admin dashboard. Keys must be passed in the `X-API-Key` HTTP request header.
To revoke a key, update the key status to `revoked` in the DB or click the revoke button.

children.title: 2.2 Role Based Access Control (RBAC)
children.summary: There are three standard roles supported: 1. `Reader`: Can query search indices and chat. 2. `Writer`: Can upload and parse manuals/documents. 3. `Admin`: Full permissions, including API key generation and system configuration edits.
children.content:
There are three standard roles supported:
1. `Reader`: Can query search indices and chat.
2. `Writer`: Can upload and parse manuals/documents.
3. `Admin`: Full permissions, including API key generation and system configuration edits.

children.title: Chapter 3: Performance Tuning and Caching
children.summary: To maintain high responsiveness, caching must be properly configured.
children.content: To maintain high responsiveness, caching must be properly configured.

children.title: 3.1 Semantic Caching
children.summary: The semantic cache uses a similarity threshold of 0.85 (cosine distance). If a query matches a cached question with similarity >= 0.85, the cached response is returned.
children.content: The semantic cache uses a similarity threshold of 0.85 (cosine distance). If a query matches a cached question with similarity >= 0.85, the cached response is returned.

children.title: 3.2 Token Bucket Rate Limiter
children.summary: The rate limiter enforces limits per API key: - Burst limit: 60 tokens (requests) - Refill rate: 1 token per second
children.content:
The rate limiter enforces limits per API key:
- Burst limit: 60 tokens (requests)
- Refill rate: 1 token per second
